source_jobs.title: Founding Solutions Engineer
source_jobs.description:
We're looking for a Founding Solutions Engineer to join our growing team and play a pivotal role in driving new business across a global territory. You'll work side-by-side with Account Executives to own the technical outcome of every deal — from first demo to signed contract — while serving as a trusted advisor, technical translator, and product advocate. This is a high-impact, high-visibility role at the intersection of engineering and customer success, and it's ideal for someone who loves being close to the product, the field, and the cutting edge.




ABOUT UNBLOCKED

Unblocked is a high-growth, well-funded SaaS company that has built a context engine for coding agents and developers. This allows agents to be provided with the right context to research, plan and implement coding tasks without developers having to babysit them; thus reducing time and tokens in the agentic development lifecycle. Additionally, Unblocked provides developers a Q&A and Code Review interface to answer questions about their applications and architecture.




ABOUT YOU

You’ll play a key role in supporting customers as they evaluate and adopt Unblocked, ensuring an excellent product experience and continuously improving the quality of our answers.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Pre-Sales & New Business
   
   - Partner closely with Account Executives on new business opportunities, taking full ownership of the technical workstream throughout the sales cycle
   
   - Cover a global new business territory spanning West Coast North America through EMEA, with travel to customer sites and industry conferences
   
   Technical Demonstrations
   
   - Deliver compelling, tailored live demos and lead technical Q&A sessions with prospective customers
   
   - Maintain and continuously improve demo environments and supporting assets to reflect the latest product capabilities
   
   Proof of Concept
   
   - Scope and design POCs with a clear understanding of customer integration requirements and technical constraints
   
   - Identify and flag non-standard configurations early, keeping the broader team informed
   
   - Speak confidently to system architecture, including dedicated VPC deployments and enterprise infrastructure considerations
   
   Enablement & Training
   
   - Run technical training sessions and enablement workshops for customers and prospects
   
   - Serve as a subject matter expert on MCP best practices and agentic tooling
   
   Customer & Field Support
   
   - Monitor Slack, email, and other channels to ensure technical questions are answered promptly and thoroughly
   
   - Complete first-pass security reviews and questionnaires in collaboration with internal teams
   
   Product Feedback Loop
   
   - Act as the voice of the field — actively synthesizing and communicating customer insights, pain points, and emerging patterns back to Product and Engineering
   
   - Translate what you're hearing in deals into actionable product intelligence


REQUIREMENTS

 - Prior Founding SE experience required; strong engineering acumen preferred — you don't need to have held the title, but you need to think and communicate like an engineer

 - Startup experience — you're comfortable with ambiguity, can context-switch quickly, and know how to build a process where none exists

 - Demonstrable ability to manage multiple concurrent technical engagements - you have experience working with potential clients and active clients simultaneously without missing a beat

 - Deep familiarity with the agentic AI space — you've built with tools like Claude Code, Cursor, or Codex and have a genuine grasp of the context and memory problem these tools are solving

 - Hands-on experience with agentic workflows and skills — you can demo them, explain them, and help customers implement them

 - Genuine curiosity about what's next — you follow new releases closely, experiment eagerly, and can rapidly incorporate new capabilities into GTM assets and demos
   


CULTURALLY, WE’R

source_jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT UNBLOCKED

Unblocked is a high-growth, well-funded SaaS company that helps answer questions software development teams have about their applications. This allows them to spend less time in meetings/dealing with interruptions and more time writing code.

We are a small team with a track record of building developer tools that solve real problems. We encourage participation in the entire product development process, and you will have the opportunity to help define Unblocked and shape its roadmap, implement the solutions that deliver the experience customers love, and get firsthand feedback from the teams who use what we have built.


ABOUT YOU

You’re an experienced software development engineer with a track record of building and shipping products that customers love. You’ve seen enough to know what not to do and still maintain an unreasonable passion to automate everything else. You are open to learning, evaluating and adopting new technologies.


WHAT YOU’LL DO

As a senior member of the team, you’ll play a critical role in architecting, building, and scaling the core systems that power Unblocked. You’ll work closely with other experienced engineers to:

 - Work independently on smaller projects and deliver them on time, gradually taking on larger projects and mentoring other team members.

 - Build and optimize scalable data pipelines that ingest and process large volumes of structured and unstructured data.

 - Build integrations with third-party services and APIs, ensuring they are reliable, performant, and secure.

 - Work closely with product designers and frontend developers to create and implement end-to-end user experiences that are intuitive and delightful.

 - Work closely with devops and security teams to ensure that our systems are secure and resilient. You will own the security and resilience of the systems you build.




REQUIREMENTS

 - Based in Vancouver, British Columbia (and be in the office 4 days a week).

 - Expert-level software development skills in a modern typesafe development language. We use Kotlin, TS, and Python.

 - Experience with microservices architecture.

 - Experiences building well-tested, scalable, fault-tolerant systems.

 - Experience working with APIs and REST-ful services.

 - Familiarity with a Cloud Platform such as AWS, Azure, or GCP.

 - Demonstrated leadership of fellow team members in the delivery of a project.

 - Experience collaborating with DevOps teams.




CULTURALLY, WE’RE LOOKING FOR PEOPLE WHO ARE:

 - Driven to get things done: Anxious to design, build, and ship solutions on aggressive timelines; Willing to take pen to paper and write/sketch ideas, concepts, interactions; We are looking for makers, doers, creators!

 - Able to play well with others: Comfortable in collaborative work environments; Solid communication skills; Great presenter, but even a better listener; Humble enough to actively solicit and incorporate feedback.

 - A passionate, tireless, selfless advocate for the end-user: Unwavering in your desire to provide the best experience; Must be an effective champion for the interests of the customer.

 - Different: Unique skill sets, methodologies, working styles, and ideas; Able to up-level an already strong team; Inspire the broader team with your expertise; Willingness to work outside your comfort zone and learn from others.

 - An ambitious malcontent: Dissatisfied with the status quo in the world around you; Constantly aware of the potential for improvement with a keen desire to help technology play a more meaningful role in people’s lives.




WHAT’S IN IT FOR YOU?

 - A competitive base salary.

 - Equity in the company for eligible candidates, offering the opportunity to share in our long-term success and growth.

 - Generous medical and dental benefits.

 - A very flexible vacation policy.

 - Your choice of Apple hardware to get you started.

 - Personal growth opportunities. We’re a fast-moving and ambitious company that encourages our engine

source_jobs.title: Senior AI Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT UNBLOCKED

Unblocked is a high-growth, well-funded SaaS company that answers questions software teams have about their code, so engineers can spend less time in meetings and more time shipping.

We're a small team with a track record of building developer tools that solve real problems. You'll help define Unblocked, shape its roadmap, build the experiences customers love, and get firsthand feedback from the teams who use what we ship.




ABOUT YOU

You've built and shipped products that engineers love, including the pipelines and services behind them. You live in modern AI developer tools: Claude Code, Cursor, agentic CLIs, MCP servers, and you have strong opinions on where they shine and where they fall short. You want to raise the bar for AI developer experience across the industry.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

As a Senior AI Engineer at Unblocked, you'll help design, build, and scale the market's best context engine. Working alongside experienced engineers, you'll:

 - Build and scale data pipelines and AI services that ingest and process large volumes of structured and unstructured data

 - Design end-to-end LLM systems across prompting, context engineering, agent architectures, and evaluation frameworks

 - Work across frontier models from Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, and open source, routing intelligently by capability, latency, and cost

 - Design clean tool and context surfaces that agents can reliably reason and act over

 - Obsess over developer experience. Our customers are engineers and expect that we push the bar higher with every release

 - Influence the roadmap, mentor teammates, and continuously raise the technical bar for the whole team




REQUIREMENTS

 - Based in Vancouver, BC, and willing to be in the office four days a week

 - You've shipped production LLM applications at scale, not just notebook prototypes

 - Hands-on experience with context engineering: agentic retrieval, chunking, embeddings, reranking, graphs

 - Hands-on experience with frontier models across providers, with a view on when to reach for each

 - A track record of building evaluation harnesses for non-deterministic systems and using them to ship with confidence

 - Expert familiarity with agentic coding environments

 - Demonstrated leadership of teammates through the delivery of a project

 - Experience architecting and shipping complex backend systems, ideally in AI/ML or data-heavy domains




DESIRABLE SKILLS

 - Working knowledge of AI observability and eval tooling

 - Expert-level software development skills in a modern typesafe language

 - You've built MCP servers, agent SDKs, or other developer-facing AI infrastructure

 - Experience with safety and guardrails for LLM systems, including prompt injection, PII handling, and untrusted content ingestion

 - Eval-driven optimization through distillation or fine-tuning, where it actually pays off




CULTURALLY, WE’RE LOOKING FOR PEOPLE WHO ARE:

 - Driven with a bias for action: You prototype in hours, not weeks. You ship, watch users, and iterate. You're a maker, not a deliberator

 - AI-native: Modern AI developer tools are muscle memory for you, not novelty. You have opinions on agent loops, context windows, model routing, and tool design, and you want to raise the bar for AI developer experience across the industry

 - Able to play well with others: Comfortable in collaborative work environments. A solid communicator and an even better listener, humble enough to actively solicit and incorporate feedback

 - A passionate, tireless, selfless advocate for the end-user: Unwavering in your desire to provide the best experience. An effective champion for the interests of the developer

 - Different: You bring a unique perspective, skill set, or way of working that up-levels an already strong team. Willing to work outside your comfort zone and learn from others

 - An ambitious malcontent: Dissatisfied with the status quo in the world around you. Constantly aware of the potential for

notes: High-growth SaaS company with a strong focus on engineering and product development.
